items.titolo: Illinois Lawmakers Just Passed America’s Strongest AI Safety Bill
items.descrizione: The bill requires companies like OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google to have third parties confirm they’re following safety standards. Illinois governor JB Pritzker says he’ll sign it.

items.titolo: I was intrigued by Google's new video-cloning Omni AI - then I considered the implications
items.descrizione: Google's Gemini Omni combines realism, avatars, style control, and natural-language editing in one AI video tool.
